markers.evidence_type: ECM gene, shared with fetal fibroblasts, scRNA-seq
ECM gene, shared with fetal fibroblasts, scRNA-seq
ECM gene, shared with fetal fibroblasts, scRNA-seq

other_findings.finding: Fb2 (F2) is enriched in AD and psoriasis lesional and non-lesional skin compared to healthy skin
Fetal skin fibroblasts express more genes relating to Fb2 adult fibroblasts, suggesting functional specialisation toward ECM remodeling
Skin fibroblast F2 cell program is augmented in AD and psoriasis

evidence_quotes.quote: fibroblasts in fetal skin express more genes relating to Fb2 adult fibroblasts, including COL1A1, COL1A2 and COL6A1, suggesting they are functionally specialized towards ECM remodeling and maintenance
Fb2 fibroblasts are significantly enriched compared to healthy skin and have upregulated expression of the chemokines CXCL12 and CCL19
